reviews.review_description: This game was one of the first games I bought on my VR and it was honestly one of the best games I have ever played. There have been practically no glitches since I started playing. However, like other reviews, I agree that there should be a sandbox/ free style mode where you can have endless fun.

It is constantly switching between hand tracking and controllers which causes my hands to become part of random objects￼ I have the constantly be holding my controllers in front of the headset or else it will switch and ruin everything. Also, the bones saw being able to stab the patient now is so annoying

reviews.review_title: Please just help us with this
reviews.review_description: I'm playing the game on second right round a little bit hard you get used to it in that but it barely even tells you anything like you have to go so fast on the second round or it don't tell you later tells you to grab the thing some people don't even know what those are is a good game with sandbox mode where you can have endless fun but pretty good

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review and feedback. Most of the time it's all about choosing the right strategy and tools and it gets a lot easier to complete a level. 

There is no time limit on a level and if you keep the patient alive, you have all the time to complete a level. Here is how to do it in level 3: Keep an eye on the monitor where you can see the "Brain oxygen" level and the "Blood Oxygen" level. If the "Brain Oxygen" level is low, do the cardiac massage deeply by pressing down on the chest of the patient far enough (you can hear a confirmation sound). If the "Blood Oxygen" level is low, pump on the respirator. On the screen on your right, you can see the checklist of tasks you need to accomplish to finish the level.

There is an "Onboarding" level that teaches the basics of Surgineer (pay attention to the screen where you can see the task that needs to be completed), but the rest is not explained on purpose because trying out tools and figuring out what to use is part of the gameplay, as there are multiple ways to solve the Surgineer puzzles.

But if you get stuck, here is a playlist of walkthrough videos of all the levels:
www.tinyurl.com/surgineer-help
We hope this helps!

reviews.review_description: When I first bought this game I didn’t know how much fun it would be. It was one of my first purchases, and I was on it endlessly. All day everyday redoing levels. Wish there were more levels. Or like how other people have said, unlimited mode. I definitely recommend purchasing this game. It will be something you look forward to. Although the new update is sorta annoying, especially with the bone saw being able to stab ppl. So that’s a down…but otherwise, really nice game. Thanks for your time

reviews.review_title: Don't buy it, it's very boring.
reviews.review_description: I find it very disappointing; this game had so much potential, but ultimately it's only, I think, 12 levels or so, and once you've finished them, there's nothing else you can do except replay them.And it's really, really boring. I actually wanted to return it, but for some reason I couldn't. Please don't buy it!

I was thinking that when you beat the game there should be some sort of sandbox mode maybe where you can spawn stuff in you have cheats you can make it to where the patient can't die cuz this game really really has potential and I like it please add this.

reviews.review_title: Fun game. Not for the faint of heart.
reviews.review_description:
Update: Somehow this game is actually MORE broken since when I made this original post. On the last level my left hand would automatically grab the control and lower the robot arm into the patient. I physically had to put my left hand behind my back just to keep from accidentally using it. That being said I did manage to A++ all levels and left a tips and tricks video on my channel on how to do it.
Video is back up so check it out. Channel name below.


So obviously it contains blood and gore. Should go without saying but it can be disturbing to removed a head etc. that’s said it can be a pretty fun puzzle / strategy game. Some issues I take with the game is 

A) it’s doesn’t always grab objects right
B) Hands get caught up on things way to easily
C) adrenaline injector is way too sensitive.

Outside of that for the price tag it’s a pretty fun game.

Check my playlist Tips and tricks on youTube for how to get perfect scores that’s  PR -IN -VR on YouTube
after playing a bit more the leg transplant level was very easy and it wasnt a game bug, it was me. i had to use the cutting pen instead of the scalpels. very fun game and it needs more levels.

There’s not clear instructions on what to do. The first level tells you to inject adrenaline into the heart but for the life of me I cannot figure out how to do this, the I in the corner of the task doesn’t tell you what to do either. there’s an annoying beep the entire time which makes it hard to play. I see potential but the first entry level just throws you in with no help which is the opposite of what the entry level to the game should do.

reviews.review_description: I don’t understand why people are hating on this game. Yes, I already completed all the levels and there really isn’t any levels, but you can really try to make challenges. If you have no idea what to do or what the tools do, it’s your fault, not the developer.

There’s no reason for giving this game more than 2 stars.

By now I played a lot of games which all were at least decent… This is my first bad review because this game is sooo awful:

- Tracking itself works but the hands are so imprecise and grabbing stuff is HARD
- Game literally requires sonic speed AND 3 hands (How can you even grab veins with those big, clubby hands)
- It’s 10€ and I wouldn’t even play it for free

So overall it’s the worst game I’ve seen so far

I refunded once, rebought it and I’m again regretting it… I want my cash back

Play time is not even an hour if your not too bad at operating people… for 10 bucks??

NOT recommended

Update: Developer response doesn’t help at all, I was talking about the bad “Controller Tracking”. I don’t even want to talk about “Hand Tracking”, it’s the worst I’ve ever seen (it’s basically impossible to play with hand tracking). The vein grabbing tool sucks even more than your own hands…

The developers also don’t care about our reviews 😐

developer_response.body:
We are sorry Surgineer didn’t meet your expectations. The game doesn't require sonic speed because there is no time limit. But you need to make sure the patient stays alive: Pay attention to the screen that tells you what to do next and take care of the blood and brain oxygen levels.

Here is a walkthrough:
www.tinyurl.com/surgineer-help

We are sorry you encountered an issue with the healing gun. It could be that your hands in the game are too small. Try the following:
Go into settings and adjust your size. This will also adjust the size of your hands in the game. You should be able to use the tools as intended. If that doesn't help or if there is another issue with the healing gun, you can also reach out to us via email at support@holonautic.com so we can assist you better.

developer_response.body:
We are sorry Surgineer didn’t meet your expectations. Most of the time it's all about choosing the right strategy and tools and it gets a lot easier to complete a level. 

There is an "Onboarding" level that teaches the basics of Surgineer (pay attention to the screen where you can see the task that needs to be completed), but the rest is not explained on purpose because trying out tools and figuring out what to use is part of the gameplay because there are multiple ways to solve the Surgineer puzzles.

But if you get stuck, here is a playlist of walkthrough videos of all the levels:
www.tinyurl.com/surgineer-help

If you can't use the trigger on the tools, that means your in game hands are too small to reach the trigger. Go to settings and adjust your size, this will also adjust the size of your hands in the game. This way, you should be able to use all the tools as expected.

We hope this helps!

developer_response.body:
We are sorry to hear that Surgineer didn’t quite meet your expectations.

Regarding your experience, please note that switching between controllers and hand tracking is managed automatically by the Meta Quest, rather than the game itself.

How to fix this: You can prevent accidental switching by going into your Meta Quest Settings and turning off the Auto-Switch feature between controllers and hand tracking.

Regarding the Leg amputation level: Most of the time it's all about choosing the right strategy and tools and it gets a lot easier to complete a level. Instead of using a scalpel, try the laser.

Here is a playlist of walkthrough videos of all the levels:
www.tinyurl.com/surgineer-help

We hope this improves your experience!

developer_response.body:
We are sorry to hear that Surgineer didn’t meet your expectations. Please note that the Hand tracking is provided by the Meta Quest, not Surgineer.
The quality of the hand tracking heavily depends on the lighting and other conditions. Try the following

- Have good lighting in the room
- No direct sunlight or glares from windows
- Clean the cameras on your Meta Quest with the same fabric you clean the lenses
- Good contrast between the color of your hands and the background
- Keep both hands in the field of view of the Meta Quest
- Try not to move too fast in general

We hope this helps!

reviews.review_description: Hands disappear. Have to keep restarting

developer_response.body:
We are sorry Surgineer didn’t meet your expectations. Are you using hand tracking when the hands disappear? The quality of the hand tracking heavily depends on the lighting and other conditions. Try the following

- Have good lighting in the room
- No direct sunlight or glares from windows
- Clean the cameras on your Meta Quest with the same fabric you clean the lenses
- Good contrast between the color of your hands and the background
- Keep both hands in the field of view of the Meta Quest
- Try not to move too fast in general

We hope this helps!

reviews.review_title: This is horrible don’t buy it
reviews.review_description: I want a refundar
At first it was fine but then the tools start glitching and then the patient DIES and you end up feeling guilty. FIX THE FREAKIN GAME

developer_response.body:
We are sorry Surgineer didn’t meet your expectations. Most of the time it's all about choosing the right strategy and tools and it gets a lot easier to complete a level. 

Pay attention to the screen that tells you what to do next and take care of the blood and brain oxygen levels so the patient stays alive.

If you get stuck, here is a playlist of walkthrough videos of all the levels:
www.tinyurl.com/surgineer-help

We hope this helps!
